Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dragon Army]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — The Dragon Army is a group of Travelers that is distinct from other Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — The graduation ritual is the final challenge for the Dragon Army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Simon is a member of the Dragon Army.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Dragon Army needs new blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Dragon Army was broken after the death of King Zakareth the Fifth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — The Dragon Army consists of Valinhall Travelers who are known for murdering other Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — The Dragon Army was once a strong ally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — The Dragon Army is a group Naraka would relish seeing get what it deserved.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Dragon Army once opposed Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Valin is the founder of the Dragon Army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai is a member of the Dragon Army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Denner and Kai are members of the Dragon Army.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Many of the Dragon Army failed to pass the test of a specific room for months or years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Many members of the Dragon Army never earned ghost armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Kai and Valin are students of the Dragon Army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Indirial was tasked with disarming the Dragon Army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Two members of the Dragon Army stepped into Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — The last soldier of the Dragon Army has abandoned her Territory.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
